overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a rural orchard at night. The scene transitions from open blooming fields to a more enclosed trail approaching a distant wooden hut, with atmospheric teal-green lighting and dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural orchard path at night

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the blooming orchard, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: trees with white blossoms lining the right side of the path
winding dirt trail through the countryside
grassy terrain and low hills on the left side
dark teal night sky visible overhead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open dirt path through a rural orchard at night. Blooming white trees line the right side while open grassland stretches to the left under a dark teal sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail through dense vegetation and orchard

events.description: path curves left becoming more enclosed by dense dark trees on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt follows the curving path as dense foliage closes in on the left, continuing through the mixed orchard and forest

entered.detail: tall dark evergreen trees creating a dense canopy on the left side
tall grass and underbrush growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves left and becomes more enclosed as dense dark forest closes in on the left. The blooming orchard trees remain visible on the right but closer now, while the open sky becomes partially obscured by the tree canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden hut in rural wilderness

events.description: wooden hut becomes visible in the distance ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking toward the small wooden hut now visible ahead, maintaining a steady pace along the narrowing trail

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with a sloped roof visible ahead on the path
stacked logs or fallen timber lying on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the path continues winding through the dense vegetation, a small wooden hut comes into view in the distance ahead. The blooming orchard trees recede into the background on the right while the dense forest remains close on the left, and fallen logs appear beside the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path that transforms from an open rural orchard into a secluded forest trail. It begins with Geralt walking past blooming white trees on the right and wide grasslands on the left under a dark teal night sky. As the path curves left, the environment becomes more enclosed, with a dense dark forest closing in from the left and the tree canopy beginning to obscure the open sky. The scene then shifts as the path winds further through the thick vegetation, where the blooming orchard trees recede into the background and fallen logs appear beside the trail. Finally, the camera pushes forward as a small wooden hut emerges in the distance ahead.
